mapper.insert: INSERT INTO delivery_urge (shipment_id, order_id, user_id, urge_date, remark, handled, admin_id, admin_remark, handled_at) VALUES (#{shipmentId}, #{orderId}, #{userId}, #{urgeDate}, #{remark}, #{handled}, #{adminId}, #{adminRemark}, #{handledAt})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM delivery_urge WHERE shipment_id = #{shipmentId} AND urge_date = #{urgeDate} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM delivery_urge WHERE shipment_id = #{shipmentId} ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE delivery_urge SET handled = #{handled}, admin_id = #{adminId}, admin_remark = #{adminRemark}, handled_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
